CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2025 Continued To Sep-24-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Voluntary Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.770
Off Calendar Jun-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff 822 W Washington LP's unopposed Motion For Voluntary Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.770 is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and a proper showing having been made under California Rules of Court, rule 3.770, the court orders Plaintiff may dismiss his individual claims with prejudice and his class claims without prejudice.

Moving Party to execute and file CV 110 form(s) to effectuate dismissal. Moving Party is advised to present this order to the clerk at the time of presenting the executed CV110 form(s).

Moving Party must submit a proposed order that includes the above text no later than 8:30 am on June 30, 2025, by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Continued To Jun-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF 822 W WASHINGTON LP's Motion For Voluntary Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.770.

Continued to June 30, 2025, on the court's motion. The court orders the documents filed conditionally under seal are now unsealed, and these documents shall be available on the public register of actions. No party timely filed a motion to seal, and no showing has been made.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal
Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Motion To Seal.

This motion was filed on June 2, 2025, for a hearing scheduled on June 3, 2025. Due to the untimely filing, the motion did not make the court's calendar and is therefore taken off calendar.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Voluntary Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.770
Off Calendar Apr-21-2025 Continued To Jun-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF 822 W WASHINGTON LP DBA NUEVA VENICE's Motion For Voluntary Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.770.

Plaintiff 822 W Washington's Motion For Voluntary Dismissal Of Class Action Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.770 is CONTINUED TO June 3, 2025, at 9:00 am in this Department. Courtesy copies of all such filings must be provided to this department within two court days of filing.

(see word minutes for full details)

Moving Party submits a proposed order prior to open court for the court's review.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
